message:
feat(lab/network): add deterministic distributed test harness

Introduces the distributed test harness that bridges SimulatedNetwork
with the remote execution model for reproducible distributed testing:

- harness.rs (992 lines): DistributedHarness drives deterministic
  message dispatch between SimNodes over SimulatedNetwork. Each SimNode
  processes remote messages (spawn requests, acks, cancellations,
  result deliveries, lease renewals). Supports composable FaultScript
  for timed fault injection (partitions, heals, crashes, restarts,
  lease expiry). Includes HarnessTraceEvent for full audit trail.

- network/mod.rs: Re-exports DistributedHarness, SimNode, FaultScript,
  HarnessFault, HarnessTraceEvent, HarnessTraceKind, NodeEvent.

- network/network.rs: Add PartialOrd + Ord derives to HostId for
  use in BTreeMap-based deterministic data structures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
